docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF D'ORLEANS, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT GRATS, MARK SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          MAR-10-2000 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-04-2000 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       FEB-22-2000

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2000, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF D'ORLEANS PAUL. HEARING SET FOR APR-19-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-11-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON OCT-11-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. NO DEFAULT SHALL BE ENTERED UNTIL SANCTIONS ARE PAID. OSC AND FURTHER SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER PAUL D'ORLEANS, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-26-2000 CONTINUED FROM OCT-11-2000 TO DEC-27-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT

ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR FEB-15-2000 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 212

OSC CALENDAR OF APR-19-2000, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON APR-19-2000, TO FILE POS AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC AND SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF IN PRO PER, WHO IS REQUIRED TO FILE STATUS STATEMENT 20 DAYS PRIOR TO HEARING DATE., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-04-2000 CONTINUED FROM APR-19-2000 TO JUN-14-2000 AT 01:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF FEB-15-2000, OFF CALENDAR FEB 15,2000 POS OSC OFF CALENDAR.
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF D'ORLEANS, PAUL
